message:
test(engine): add ProofExpired variant to specialization index invalidation reason coverage test

Expand the invalidation_reason_display_and_as_str test to include
ProofExpired alongside ProofRevoked, ensuring complete variant
coverage for the InvalidationReason Display and as_str implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
